introSection: Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Funtown Splashtown USA in Saco, Maine, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

Originally pink with yellow supports, the coaster was repainted in 2023 by Baynum Painting. The supports were changed to green.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Funtown Splashtown USA in Saco, Maine, USA.

Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

Originally pink with yellow supports, the coaster was repainted in 2023 by Baynum Painting. The supports were changed to green.
